context_for_next_testing_agent: StudentProfileModal attendance features fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Backend student-profile endpoint returns new fields (join_clicked_at, attendance_confirmed, attendance_confirmed_at, teacher_id), 2) StudentProfileModal has handleConfirmAttendance function and attendance buttons with data-testid, 3) Both StudentDashboard and TeacherDashboard use window.open('about:blank') BEFORE async API calls to prevent popup blocker issues. All backend tests pass. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation.
